case_title: KEVIN LEE VS. NATHANIEL KAN ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-21-2019 CONTINUED TO JUL-02-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) EMMETT SHEAR; AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S) OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
